title: tubella cobanensis
side_effects: Tubella cobanensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and stomach cramps due to its toxic alkaloids. Prolonged consumption may also lead to kidney damage and liver problems, as the plant's toxic compounds can accumulate in the body over time. In extreme cases, improper use of Tubella cobanensis has been linked to seizures, respiratory failure, and even coma. It is essential to use this plant under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional to minimize the risk of adverse effects.
